text.title: benefits-realization Failure Modes
text.summary: Migrated antipatterns for benefits-realization as failure modes. Add detector + repair clauses where missing.

failure-mode.description: Agents or analysts asserting benefit causality from correlation in post-launch data without a declared attribution method.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Attribution hallucination overstates the project's impact, inflates reported ROI, and corrupts future investment decisions by rewarding projects that benefited from coincident market or operational improvements.
